summary_en: ¥6.00/share, ¥190M total dividend (period ended 2026-03-31, ex-date 2026-06-29). First dividend since prior zero payout in FY3/25. Sourced from other capital surplus rather than retained earnings. Restoration follows capital reduction executed in prior year and strong operational recovery.
title_en: Notice Regarding Dividend of Surplus (Year-End Dividend: Restoration of Dividend Payments)
translation_en_brief: Gokurakuyu Holdings announced on 2026-05-20 that its board has resolved to pay a year-end dividend of ¥6.00 per share, totaling ¥190 million, with record date 2026-03-31 and ex-date 2026-06-29. The prior year (FY3/25) paid ¥0.00 per share. The company is funding the restoration from other capital surplus rather than retained earnings, as part of an accelerated restoration strategy. Management cited strong operational performance—including improved unit economics and revenue structure—following a capital reduction (reduction in stated capital and capital reserves) executed in the prior year to enhance financial flexibility. The dividend is subject to approval at the company's scheduled ordinary general meeting on 2026-06-26.
